LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CERENA BARROS' PETITION TO VACATE THE ARBITRATION AWARD OF ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS BY ARBITRATOR E. GARY SPITKO, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, CORRECT AWARD IS DENIED AS BEING UNTIMELY UNDER THE APPLICABLE LAW. THE COURT FINDS THE ARBITRATOR'S SERVICE OF THE AWARD ON PARTIES BY E-MAIL TRIGGERED THE THREE MONTH RUNNING TIME, AND THE PETITION WAS FILED AFTER THIS THREE MONTH RUNNING TIME. RESPONDENTS' REQUEST IN ITS OPPOSITION TO CONFIRM THE ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. RESPONDENTS' COUNSEL SHALL SERVE ITS PROPOSED ORDER ON PETITIONER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 BEFORE SUBMITTING THE PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petitioner Cerena Barros Petition To Vacate The Arbitration Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs By Arbitrator E. Gary Spitko, Or In The Alternative, Correct Award
Off Calendar Feb-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. G. ARTHUR MENESES, ESQ. of Initiative Legal Group, Tel No. 310-712-8020 appearing telephonically for Petitioner Cerena Barros;
Atty. DOUGLAS G.A. JOHNSTON, ESQ. of Jackson Lewis P.C., Tel No. 415-394-9400 appearing for Respondents Macy's, Inc., and Macy's West Stores, Inc.

The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear at hearing. Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court orders as follows: PETITIONER CERENA BARROS' Petition To Vacate The Arbitration Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs By Arbitrator E. Gary Spitko, Or In The Alternative, Correct Award is denied as being untimely under the applicable law. The Court finds the arbitrator's service of the award on parties by e-mail triggered the three month running time, and the petition was filed after this three month running time. Respondents' request in its opposition to confirm the arbitration award is granted. Respondents' counsel shall serve its proposed order on Petitioner in compliance with CRC 3.1312 before submitting the proposed order to the Court for signature. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion To Strike Respondent Macys West Stores, Incs Opposition To Petition To Vacate The Arbitration Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs By Arbitrator E. Gary Spitko, Or In The Alternative, Correct Award
Off Calendar Feb-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. G. ARTHUR MENESES, ESQ. of Initiative Legal Group, Tel No. 310-712-8020 appearing telephonically for the Petitioner;
Atty. DOUGLAS G.A. JOHNSTON of Jackson Lewis P.C. of 415-394-9400 appearing for Respondents Macy's Inc., and Macy's West Stores Inc.

Matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER CERENA BARROS' Motion To Strike Respondent Macys West Stores, Inc.'s Opposition To Petition To Vacate The Arbitration Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs By Arbitrator E. Gary Spitko, Or In The Alternative, Correct Award is denied. Even assuming that the opposition papers were untimely filed, the Court exercises its discretion to consider them. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

Notice Of Hearing Re: Petitioner Cerena Barros Petition To Vacate The Arbitration Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs By Arbitrator E. Gary Spitko, Or In The Alternative, Correct Award
Off Calendar Feb-08-2016 Continued To Feb-22-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. G. ARTHUR MENESES, ESQ. of Initiative Legal Group, Tel No. 310-712-8020 appearing telephonically for the Petitioner;
Atty. DOUGLAS G.A. JOHNSTON of Jackson Lewis P.C. of 415-394-9400 appearing for Respondents Macy's Inc., and Macy's West Stores Inc.

Matter argued by counsel. The Court rejects Respondents' arguments save the argument as to equitable tolling not applying. Due to Respondents' having cited new authority at hearing, the Court shall continue the hearing on PETITIONER CERENA BARROS' Petition To Vacate The Arbitration Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs By Arbitrator E. Gary Spitko, Or In The Alternative, Correct Award to February 22, 2016 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion. Petitioner shall have until 2/16/16 to file a supplemental reply brief, and shall submit a courtesy copy of that brief to contestdept302tr@sftc.org. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
